generation_method.hash: SHA-256 of UTF-8 source content normalized to LF
generation_method.null_handling: unavailable scalar metadata is null; unavailable or undeclared list metadata is []
generation_method.serialization: canonical JSON, lexicographically sorted object keys, two-space indentation, terminal LF
generation_method.sorting: Unicode order by normalized repository-relative POSIX source_path
generation_method.source_scope: Markdown sources excluding generated outputs, dependencies, caches, and build artifacts
generation_method.timestamp: maximum declared last_updated date normalized to 00:00:00Z
